title: trigonostemon verticillatus var. salicifolius
intro: Trigonostemon verticillatus var. salicifolius is a variety of the Trigonostemon verticillatus plant, a species of plant in the Euphorbiaceae family. It is an evergreen shrub native to China, known for its medicinal properties and potential health benefits. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The herbal preparations of Trigonostemon verticillatus var. salicifolius include decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and ointments for topical application.
